title: Vietnam eyes Q3 launch for regulated crypto asset market: Report
message_html: Vietnam eyes Q3 launch for regulated crypto asset market: Report ...
snippet: Vietnam’s deputy minister of finance reportedly said the country is planning to launch its regulated cryptocurrency market in the third quarter of 2026 to answer the growing demand for digital assets.
